description: Iran frees journalist Cecilia Sala after 21 days, linked to Italy’s detention of an Iranian engineer.
Trump signs NSPM-2 reinstating the ‘maximum pressure’ campaign on Iran.
First indirect US–Iran nuclear talks held in Muscat (Witkoff / Araghchi).
Second round of indirect nuclear talks held in Rome.
UK arrests several Iranian men over a suspected Iran-linked attack plot.
Oman-brokered US–Houthi ceasefire halts US strikes in Yemen.
Nuclear talks rounds 4–5 (Muscat 11 May, Rome 23 May) deadlock on enrichment.
Israel intercepts the Madleen aid vessel (Greta Thunberg aboard) in international waters.
IAEA Board finds Iran in non-proliferation breach — first such finding in ~20 years.
Operation Rising Lion: 200+ aircraft strike Natanz/Fordow/Isfahan, airbases and Parchin — start of the 12-day war.
Operation True Promise III: ~150 ballistic missiles and 100+ drones fired at Israel.
Israel strikes Tehran Defence Ministry, missile-storage sites and fuel depots.
Sustained Iranian ballistic barrages on Tel Aviv, Bat Yam and Rehovot.
Operation Midnight Hammer: 7 B-2s drop 14 GBU-57 on Fordow/Natanz; ~30 Tomahawks on Isfahan.
Iran fires ~14 missiles at Al Udeid Air Base, Qatar (pre-warned; 13 intercepted, no casualties).
Houthis break the May ceasefire, sinking the Magic Seas and resuming Red Sea attacks.
14-nation joint statement condemns a surge in Iranian assassination and kidnapping plots abroad.
Australia expels Iran’s ambassador after ASIO ties the IRGC to 2024 antisemitic arson — first expulsion since WWII.
The E3 trigger the JCPOA snapback mechanism, starting a 30-day countdown to reimpose UN sanctions.
UN Security Council rejects a sanctions-relief extension (4–9–2), locking in snapback.
Pre-2015 UN sanctions snap back into force; the EU reimposes its restrictive measures on 29 Sep.
French detainees Kohler & Paris released from prison but barred from leaving (exact day unconfirmed ⚠).
Australia lists the IRGC as a state sponsor of terrorism and imposes new sanctions.
Nationwide protests erupt over the rial’s collapse and ~42% inflation; a mass crackdown follows.
Protest crackdown peaks amid an internet shutdown; security forces fire on crowds.
Operation Epic Fury: ~900 US strikes in 12h; Supreme Leader Khamenei and senior officials killed — second war begins.
Iran fires ~170 ballistic missiles at Israel and US bases (Al Udeid, Ali Al Salem, Al Dhafra, 5th Fleet HQ Bahrain).
A round of US–Iran talks in Muscat reports progress the same day the war begins.
Sustained joint strikes on Natanz, command HQs and the state broadcaster.
Iran strikes Israel and Gulf states; ~10 vessels hit in the Strait of Hormuz; a drone hits RAF Akrotiri.
Pakistan brokers a conditional two-week US–Iran ceasefire toward a lasting agreement.
Trump says a deal reopening the Strait of Hormuz is ‘largely negotiated.’
US ‘self-defense’ strikes hit two IRGC mine-laying boats and a Bandar Abbas SAM site; Iran calls it a ceasefire violation.
